sections.paragraph:
Original: חנף

Transliteration: chânêph

Phonetic: khaw-nafe'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be profaned, be defiled, be polluted, be corrupt
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be polluted
      2. to be profane, be godless
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to pollute
      2. to make profane, make godless, cause to be defiled

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 696

Part(s) of speech: Verb
